name: Colonial Hot Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 Acorn squash, halved and seeded removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all excess fat from the beef. Place cubes in a plastic bag; shake to coat well with flour.
2. Combine tomato juice and instant beef broth in a small saucepan; heat just to boiling, then remove from heat.
3. In a separate bowl, combine parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper.
4. Layer vegetables and meat into the slow cooker as follows: half of each potato, onion, and beef with a light sprinkling of the seasoning mixture. Repeat with remaining potatoes, onions, beef, and seasonings.
5. Cut each squash half into 6 slices; peel; arrange on top. Pour hot tomato juice mixture over the top; dot with butter or margarine; cover.
6. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, or until meat and vegetables are tender.
